news.title: Classroom to crime scene: Hands-On learning in UNI’s new Crime Scene House
news.summary_en: UNI criminology students are gaining hands-on investigative experience in the Crime Scene House, a realistic training space where staged evidence-based scenarios help bring classroom concepts to life.

news.title: This UNI grad found a path at a major accounting firm immediately after graduation
news.summary_en: Alexis Munsell loves living the life of an accountant. It was a dream she realized at the University of Northern Iowa.
